response.overview: Raymond's friends are throwing him a surprise birthday party in Everybody Does Raymond, but they start celebrating before it even begins. A guest and the bartender start the action off by exchanging blowjobs; then they're joined by another guest and so the orgy grows. By the time Raymond and his boyfriend Spike show up, everyone is naked and sucking each other. The guests grab Raymond and strip him; then line up to suck his cock. Director LaRue does a good job of capturing all of the spit-filled action. Cast: Ray Holt, Spike, Clint Cooper, Nino Bacci, Gage Michaels, Joshua Scott, Nick Young, Cameron Cruise, Anthony De Angelo
response.title: Everybody Does Raymond
